calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gary Emswiler is present.
Attorney Mathew Dos Santos representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mike Lee, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Aug -13-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
